title: Minecraft Superior Edition
description: This resource pack changes the subtitle 'Java Edition' to 'Superior Edition'
body: This resource pack changes the subtitle 'Java Edition' to 'Superior Edition' - reflecting the superiority of the original minecraft currently being ruined by Microsoft. I am sad Microsoft is slowly killing Java Edition to get more of the playerbase to their copycat, so let's enjoy the last moments we have with this simple, yet relateable resource pack
